description:
Practice HFLÜ radio calls, situation reports and commands.
Competition Radio Trainer helps firefighters prepare for the
Hessische Feuerwehrleistungsübung (HFLÜ).

The app supports practice of radio calls, radio conversations and
commands used in typical HFLÜ scenarios.

Typical training content:
- Ausrückemeldung
- Eintreffmeldung
- 1st and 2nd Lagemeldung
- radio conversations around breathing apparatus deployment

Suitable for HFLÜ competition teams in Hessen.

Benefits:
- quick start without paper checklists
- repeatable practice alone or as a team
- works offline
- no account required
- no ads
- no tracking

Disclaimer:
This is an unofficial training tool and not an official app of the
Hessische Landesfeuerwehrschule.
